steps.title: Substitute and simplify
steps.content:
From the first equation, $y = x + 33$. Substitute into the second:
$$(x+33)^2 = x + 33$$
Let $u = x+33$: $u^2 = u \Rightarrow u(u-1) = 0$, so $u = 0$ or $u = 1$.

steps.title: Solve for $x$
steps.content:
$u = 0 \Rightarrow x + 33 = 0 \Rightarrow x = -33$.
$u = 1 \Rightarrow x + 33 = 1 \Rightarrow x = -32$.

$x = -32$ is offered. (Note: $x = -33$ is not among choices; $-32$ is the listed solution.)

That matches choice A — A is correct.
